context: Guidelines for reimbursing approved out-of-pocket vendor and event expenses incurred by Campbell Events staff and contractors.

validation_rules.requirement: Any purchase or expense above $150 requires Mark Campbell's explicit written approval before it is committed.
validation_rules.action: Reject reimbursement requests over $150 that lack documented pre-approval.
validation_rules.notes: Approval may be granted by email or in the shared Notion expense log.
